content.speakerText: Can you drop this off at my desk? Thanks!
content.speakerTextCn: 能帮我把这送到我工位吗？谢谢！

options.text: Sure thing, I'll bring it over now.
I'll email it to you instead.
You should ask the security guard.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Sure thing, I'll bring it over now.' 是对请求派送的礼貌且符合职场情境的回应。其他选项要么偏离场景（如发邮件），要么不相关（如推给保安）或不专业（如否认自己是员工）。

content.speakerText: Could you send this to Marketing? It's urgent.
content.speakerTextCn: 能帮我把这送到市场部吗？很急。

options.text: On it! I'll hand-deliver it in 5.
I'll throw it in the trash.
I don't know where Marketing is.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'On it! I'll hand-deliver it in 5.' 表现出对紧急请求的积极回应，符合 'urgent' 的语境。其他选项要么荒谬（扔掉），要么消极推诿（等明天、不知道位置），不符合职场协作精神。

content.speakerText: I have a package for HR. Could you deliver it to their office?
content.speakerTextCn: 我有个给人力资源部的包裹，你能送到他们办公室吗？

options.text: No problem. I'll drop it off by the HR door.
Why don't you just mail it?
I'm not allowed to go to HR.
Can you bring it to me later?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem. I'll drop it off by the HR door.' 是自然、礼貌且符合职场惯例的回应。选项2和4推卸责任，选项3无理由拒绝，都不符合积极协助的职场文化。

content.template: Can you ___ this off at my desk?
content.hint: 这是请求派送时最常用的动词短语，表示‘顺路送去’

content.template: It's ___ — please deliver it right away.
content.hint: 强调紧急性时，这是最直接、最有效的词

content.template: I'd like to ___ this to the Sales team. Could you help?
content.hint: 表达‘请求派送’时，常用动词是 send 或 drop off
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心句型（I'd like to send...）

content.speakerText: Can you drop this off at my desk? Thanks!
content.speakerTextCn: 能帮我把这送到我工位吗？谢谢！
expectedAnswers: Sure, I'll bring it over right away.
Of course! I'll take it to your desk now.
Will do — just let me finish this email first.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了派送请求
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，语气礼貌

content.speakerText: Could you send this to Marketing? It's urgent.
content.speakerTextCn: 能帮我把这送到市场部吗？很急。
expectedAnswers: On it! I'll hand-deliver it within five minutes.
I'll get it to them ASAP — do you need a receipt?
I need the department code, but I'll take it right over.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了紧急需求并提供可行方案
语言准确性：使用了恰当的职场表达如 'ASAP', 'hand-deliver'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'urgent', 'send', 'Marketing' 相关词

content.speakerText: I have a package for IT. Can you deliver it to their floor?
content.speakerTextCn: 我有个给IT部的包裹，能送到他们楼层吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure, I'll take it up to the 5th floor for you.
I can drop it at the IT reception — would that work?
I'm heading there now; I'll leave it on their desk.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了派送请求
语言准确性：使用了正确介词和动词（take up, drop off, leave on）
表达自然度：语调自然，符合职场日常对话节奏
